tools.name: can_i_run_it
tools.description: Will a given local LLM run on given hardware? Returns fit, the best quant that fits, theoretical tok/s, and real owner-measured tok/s where available.

tools.name: recommend_quant
tools.description: Which GGUF quantization to download for a model on given hardware: the full quant ladder with file size, max context, and tok/s for each, plus the recommended pick.

tools.name: cheapest_hardware_for_model
tools.description: The cheapest catalogued, buyable machine that runs a given model at Q4 with the requested context.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List the local LLM model classes the tools know about (params, dense/MoE, native context).

tools.name: list_hardware
tools.description: List the machines the tools know about (memory, bandwidth, price, buy link).

tools.name: cost_compare
tools.description: Buy vs rent vs API cost to run a model locally: monthly/1y/3y totals, break-even months, and the energy cost per 1M tokens. Same math as /cost-calculator/.

tools.name: recommend_hardware
tools.description: Ranked list of catalogued, buyable machines that run a model at the requested context, cheapest first, with an optional budget cap.

tools.name: get_used_gpu_prices
tools.description: Current typical used-GPU prices for local-AI rigs (eBay Browse API median asking + hand-verified, monthly).

tools.name: compare_hardware
tools.description: Side-by-side memory, bandwidth, price, and (with a model) fit + tok/s for 2 to 4 machines.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "recommend_hardware" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

evidence.snippet: model, total_b, active_b, mxfp4, context, kv_precision, budget
